candidates.notes: CRITICAL FINDING: Contriever MATCHES or EXCEEDS RepSim on ALL 3 tasks at pilot scale. Contriever toxicity AUPRC=0.968 vs RepSim=0.809 (+15.9pp); Contriever counterfact R@50=1.0 vs RepSim=0.949 (+5.1pp); Contriever ftrace R@50=0.682 vs RepSim=0.660 (+2.2pp). GTR-T5 also matches/exceeds: toxicity AUPRC=0.842 (+3.3pp), counterfact R@50=1.0 (+5.1pp), ftrace R@50=0.832 (+17.2pp). Pass criteria (>5pp gap BELOW RepSim) is NOT MET because retrieval models are ABOVE RepSim, not below. Decision gate TRIGGERED: retrieval matches RepSim on >=2 tasks. This means at pilot scale, generic dense retrieval (Contriever, GTR-T5) performs AT LEAST as well as model-internal RepSim, calling into question whether RepSim captures genuine 'attribution' beyond semantic retrieval. CAVEAT: Pilot scale (N=100) may inflate retrieval performance due to high counterfact saturation; full-scale (N=5473) is critical. BM25 also R@50=1.0 on counterfact (pilot saturation artifact). Kendall tau shows Contriever > RepSim on all tasks. Experiment is GO for full scale to confirm whether this pattern holds.
